rationale: Read sections-v1.json, ledger-v1.json, and original contracts. Built DAG with 5 sections + integrator pseudo-node. Wave plan: 1=[s1,s2], 2=[s3], 3=[s4], 4=[integrator], 5=[s5].
Wrote state/coordinator/dag.json reflecting depends_on edges from the section list, with section-5 explicitly depending on the integrator pseudo-node.
Single builder is sufficient: the renderer is a thin façade over KaTeX exposing render(latex, target).
Resolved contract open question: renderer handles empty/whitespace internally with ok:true and clears target. Logged as implementation_path_chosen.
Wrote renderer.js: try/catch around katex.render(displayMode:true), returns {ok,message}, never throws past boundary.
Inspected output: signature matches contract, exception contract held, displayMode:true used.
Single builder handles textarea wiring + onLatexChange callback registration. Pure DOM.
Picked callback registration form for the input->output contract (one of two contract-allowed forms). Logged as implementation_path_chosen.
Wrote input.js: locates textarea by data-role, exposes window.inputUi.onLatexChange(cb).
Callback fires per input event with cumulative value; defensive try/catch around subscribers.
Single builder produces app.js wiring layer. Reads from inputUi, calls renderer, routes to output/error regions.
Wrote app.js: blank-input short-circuit, success path clears error, error path clears output and sets data-stale='true'.
No submit button. Stale marker applied. Error message routed correctly.
Two builders: HTML structure (slots, label, CDN tags, script order) and CSS (desktop-first 2-col layout, distinct region treatments).
Wrote index.html: h1, single textarea[data-role='latex-input'], #latex-output, #latex-error[role='alert' hidden], KaTeX 0.16.9 CDN tags, script order katex->renderer->input->app all defer.
Wrote styles.css: 2-column grid >=900px, monospace input, indigo-bordered output, red error palette, [data-stale='true'] dim/grayscale.
All structural assertions inspectable in HTML; CSS provides distinct region treatment.
Copied builder outputs into output/integration/ as renderer.js, input.js, app.js, index.html, styles.css. Wrote manifest.json with provenance and load order.
Loaded integrated artifact in jsdom; window.renderer and window.inputUi are both reachable; DOMContentLoaded handlers run cleanly.
Integrator pseudo-node marked verified — wave 5 (edge-case testing) is unblocked.
Single builder writes a Node+jsdom harness exercising every verifier:edge_case_testing assertion plus the IP machine-checkable assertions.

Initial harness run had 5 failures rooted in jsdom not exposing document/window as globals to the KaTeX Node module. Fixed by hoisting window.document/window/HTMLElement/Node to globals before calling render. Re-run: 22/22 pass. Recorded as a test_or_assertion_fix shaping decision (harness wiring, not product code).
Harness adjustment to bridge jsdom's document into the global scope KaTeX Node-module looks up. Pure test-harness wiring; no product code change. Category: test_or_assertion_fix.
All 22 assertions pass in report.json.
All sections + integrator verified. Writing build-complete.json handoff signal.
